Uses of Record Class
com.shaft.mcp.McpMobileActionResult

  • Uses of McpMobileActionResult in com.shaft.mcp

    Methods in com.shaft.mcp that return McpMobileActionResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.activateApp(String appId)
    Activates an installed app by package or bundle id.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.backgroundApp(int seconds)
    Sends the active app to the background.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.clear(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
    Clears a mobile element.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.doubleTap(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
    Double taps an element by locator.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.hideKeyboard()
    Hides the native keyboard.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.keyboardKey(String key)
    Sends a native keyboard action.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.longTap(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
    Long taps an element by locator.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.rotate(String orientation)
    Rotates an Appium device.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.swipeByOffset(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, int xOffset, int yOffset)
    Swipes one element by an offset.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.swipeCoordinates(int startX, int startY, int endX, int endY, int durationMillis)
    Swipes between screen coordinates using W3C touch actions.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.swipeElementIntoView(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, String direction)
    Swipes until a target element is visible.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.swipeTextIntoView(String targetText, String movement)
    Swipes to Android text through UiScrollable.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.tap(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue)
    Taps an element by locator.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.tapCoordinates(int x, int y)
    Taps screen coordinates using W3C touch actions.
    McpMobileActionResult
    MobileService.type(locatorStrategy locatorStrategy, String locatorValue, String textValue)
    Types text into a mobile element.
